name: testimonial-marquee
title: Testimonial Marquee
author: Parable
description: A wall of testimonial rows scrolling infinitely in alternating directions via a seamless two-half translateX(-50%) loop; hovering a row or tabbing onto any card pauses just that row, short rows are tiled with aria-hidden passes so the track always outruns the viewport, and cards fall back to a brand-accent initials disc when no avatar is given. Under prefers-reduced-motion it collapses to a static wrapped grid with no scroll and no duplicates.
